name: @mitii/sdk
description: Node SDK for running Mitii headless ask, plan, and agent sessions.

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/index.js --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --alias:vscode=../../src/node/vscode-shim.ts && cp src/index.d.ts dist/index.d.ts && cp src/types.d.ts dist/types.d.ts
